summary: Mobile optimization testing for Royal Cleaning Services. All 5 tested features passed: horizontal service cards, sticky mobile nav, compact step indicator, full booking flow, and WhatsApp rich message format.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All mobile optimizations verified and working: (1) Step 1 service cards are horizontal with 64x64 image on left and text on right. (2) Sticky nav bar is at bottom-[60px], visible without scrolling on mobile (390x844). (3) Mobile step indicator shows 'STEP X OF 9 / ServiceName' with dot track. (4) Full booking flow works end to end. (5) WhatsApp auto-opens after confirmation with rich emoji message containing all booking fields including bookingId, service, property, date, time, customer name, phone, email, address, total.
